original: Essentially an enormous bushing hammer - with spiked heads capable of extremely high vibration frequencies - this weapon was designed specifically to crush and break through the thick, heavy scales of an unruly saurmorian; making this spiked maul a favorite among law enforcement of locations with saurmorian populations.
